content.claim: As of Government Decree 182/2022, the Ministry of Interior (not an education ministry) became responsible for oversight of public education, including the Klebelsberg Center and school district system.
content.context: Fresh live research through the Legal and governance lens
limitations: Governance restructuring does not indicate substantive change to closure authority mechanics
No evidence provided on how Interior Ministry has exercised this oversight
content.population: Population described in the cited finding
content.time_scope: As reported by the cited source
